name: Bacon-Flavored Dip Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl; blend well.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make an airtight package.
3. Label as Bacon-Flavored Dip Mix. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
Makes 1 package (about 3 Tablespoons) of mix.
Bacon Flavored Dip: Combine 1 cup of sour cream and 1 package of mix. Chill at least 1 hour before serving.
Makes about 1 cup of dip.
VARIATIONS: Substitute 1 cup yogurt, 1 cup cottage cheese or 1 (8 oz) package of softened cream cheese for sour cream.
